rationale: Active cross-border attacks confirmed this cycle with fatalities, and the Iran deal stalemate continues to divert US diplomatic attention — both directly relevant to Ukrainian daily life and security.

top_events.title: Ukraine and Russia exchange cross-border attacks, three killed
top_events.summary: Confirmed fatalities from cross-border strikes this cycle; while intensity remains at background war level, each attack directly affects Ukrainian civilians' safety and infrastructure.

top_events.title: Tehran says 'nothing' finalised after Trump claims Iran deal near
top_events.summary: Continued Iran deal stalemate keeps US diplomatic focus partially diverted from Ukraine, sustaining uncertainty over the pace and scale of Western military aid.

top_events.title: US-Iran ceasefire? Not for Indian sailors being killed in Hormuz
top_events.summary: Ongoing US military activity in the Hormuz region signals continued US engagement in the Middle East, indirectly competing with Ukraine for Western strategic attention and resources.
